baseSuffix: 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, subject in lower-third, clean negative space at top for text overlay, hyper-detailed, 8K, cinematic color grading, trending social media aesthetic

fitness.label: Fitness & Workout
fitness.subject: a muscular athlete mid-rep doing a powerful deadlift, sweat dripping, veins visible, intense focus
fitness.environment: in a dark industrial gym with chalk dust in the air
fitness.camera: shot on Canon R5 with 35mm lens, motion blur on barbell
fitness.motion: barbell rises with controlled power, chalk dust swirls, sweat droplet falls in slow motion
hooks: POV: You finally hit your PR

food.label: Food & Cooking
food.subject: a gourmet smash burger with melted cheddar dripping down the sides, sesame seed brioche bun, fresh lettuce
food.environment: on a slate plate with herbs scattered on a rustic wooden table, steam rising
food.camera: shot on Sony A7IV with 90mm macro lens, extreme close-up, shallow DOF
food.motion: cheese drips down slowly, steam rises and curls, sesame seeds catch the light
hooks: You need this in your life

fashion.label: Fashion & Style
fashion.subject: a confident fashion model in an oversized trench coat and bold accessories, walking with attitude
fashion.environment: through a rain-soaked Tokyo street at night with neon signs reflecting in puddles
fashion.camera: shot on Hasselblad with 85mm lens, full body shot
fashion.motion: coat flows in the wind, puddles ripple, neon reflections shimmer, rain falls in slow motion
fashion.cameraMove: Cinematic tracking shot following the model

motivation.label: Motivation & Mindset
motivation.subject: a lone silhouette of a person standing on a mountain peak, arms slightly raised, looking at vast horizon
motivation.environment: above a cloud sea at sunrise with epic god rays piercing through
motivation.camera: shot on Sony A1 with 24-70mm lens, wide cinematic composition
motivation.motion: clouds roll slowly below, sun rays shift gently, coat moves in the wind
motivation.cameraMove: Slow crane-up revealing the vast landscape
hooks: Read this when you want to quit

comedy.label: Comedy & Skits
comedy.subject: a surprised character with exaggerated wide-eyed expression, mid-action with chaotic energy
comedy.environment: in a brightly lit modern setting with everyday objects flying around
comedy.camera: shot on Canon R6 with 50mm lens, frozen action moment
comedy.motion: objects fly chaotically in slow motion, character's expression intensifies, comedic timing
comedy.cameraMove: Static camera with slight zoom-in punch
hooks: Tell me you're [X] without telling me

travel.label: Travel & Adventure
travel.subject: a traveler in a tan jacket standing at the edge of a cliff with a backpack
travel.environment: overlooking turquoise fjords in Norway with breathtaking nature stretching to horizon
travel.camera: shot on DJI Mavic 3 Pro, ultra-wide aerial angle
travel.motion: jacket moves in wind, clouds drift, water shimmers below, birds fly across frame

hooks: Add this to your bucket list
Hidden gem you've never heard of
Save this for your next trip

beauty.label: Beauty & Skincare
beauty.subject: an extreme close-up of flawless glowing skin, dewy droplets on cheek, long lashes catching light
beauty.environment: against a clean minimal beige background with subtle gradient
beauty.camera: shot on Phase One with 120mm macro lens, ultra-shallow DOF
beauty.motion: lashes flutter gently, dewy droplet slowly slides down cheek, light shifts softly
beauty.cameraMove: Subtle slow zoom-in toward the face
hooks: Glow up secret no one tells you

pets.label: Pets & Animals
pets.subject: an adorable golden retriever puppy mid-jump catching a tennis ball, ears flying up, joyful expression
pets.environment: in a sunlit green park with bokeh background and warm summer atmosphere
pets.camera: shot on Sony A9 with 70-200mm lens, frozen action, shallow DOF
pets.motion: puppy leaps and catches ball, ears bounce, grass blades sway, sun flares gently
hooks: Tell me your pet didn't do this

tech.label: Tech & Gadgets

Tech you didn't know you needed
